confirm.reset:
I-reset ang encryption para sa account na ito?

danger.title: Pamahalaan Encryption

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Restore your encrypted chat key from a backup protected by your backup password.

smsConsent.label: I consent to receive SMS notifications and alerts from {{companyName}}. Message frequency may vary. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply <stop>STOP</stop> to unsubscribe at any time. Reply <help>HELP</help> for help.

auth.headline: Secure na pagmemensahe para sa kahit sino, kahit saan
auth.description: End-to-end encryption, pagsasalin sa 100+ wika, disappearing messages, at voice/video calling.

feature.translation: Smart, built-in na pagsasalin ng mensahe
feature.translate: Smart, built-in na pagsasalin ng mensahe
feature.seePlans: Tingnan ang mga plano at presyo

hero.line1: Secure na pagmemensahe para sa kahit sino, kahit saan — may
hero.sub: Kumuha ng libreng secure na numero ng telepono para tumawag at mag-text sa buong mundo gamit ang Wi‑Fi o data. Mag-enjoy sa end-to-end encryption, disappearing messages, at HD voice/video calling — kasama ang built-in tools na tumutulong sa iyong manatiling konektado sa iba’t ibang bansa.
hero.freeNote: Libre ang basic calling at texting. Kailangan ng upgrade para sa advanced AI at Premium features.

feat.translate: Tanggalin ang mga hadlang sa wika sa mga usapan mo

auth.desktopTip: Nasa desktop ka ba? I-scan gamit ang phone mo para makuha ang app.
auth.scanHelper: Nasa desktop ka ba? I-scan gamit ang phone mo para makuha ang app.
auth.subhead: Pribado, encrypted, at instant na naisaling pagmemensahe.
auth.tip: Tip: Gamitin ang parehong account sa web at mobile. Naka-sync ang mga mensahe mo.
auth.scanHint: Scan para i-download ang app o buksan sa iyong browser.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 characters. Gumamit ng strong, unique password.
registration.smsConsent: Sa paggawa ng account, sumasang-ayon kang makatanggap ng SMS notifications na may kaugnayan sa iyong Chatforia activity, tulad ng mga mensahe mula sa ibang user. Maaaring may message at data rates. Maaari kang mag-opt out anumang oras sa Settings.
registration.phoneHelp: Used for verification, security, and SMS features where supported.

profile.title: Profile ng User
profile.mustLogin: Kailangan mong mag-sign in para makita ang settings.
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Ipakita ang orihinal at naisaling mga mensahe
profile.noPrivateKey: Walang private key sa device na ito na puwedeng i-export.
profile.setBackupPassword: Mag-set ng password para i-encrypt ang backup mo:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Ilagay ang password para sa itong backup:
profile.importSuccess: Na-import ang private key sa device na ito.
profile.importFailed: Nabigo ang pag-import ng key (maling password o sirang file).
profile.keysRotated: Nagawa ang bagong key pair at na-upload ang public key.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Hindi kailanman umaalis sa device na ito ang private key mo. Mag-export ng password-protected copy para ma-restore ito sa ibang device.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Nasa Free ka — gamitin ang quick Sun/Moon options sa ibaba. Mag-upgrade para ma-unlock ang mas maraming themes.
profile.backupDesc: I-back up ang encryption key mo para ligtas mong ma-restore ang mga mensahe sa ibang device.
profile.privacyBlurEnabled: I-blur ang mga mensahe bilang default
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: I-blur kapag hindi naka-focus ang app
profile.freePlanCopy: Nasa free plan ka. Mag-upgrade para ma-unlock ang mas maraming feature tulad ng backups, extra numbers, at advanced privacy options.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Hindi mabuksan ang billing portal. Pakisubukan muli.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Abisuhan ako kung kinopya ang mensahe ko
profile.followHint: Lalabas ang stories nila sa Following feed mo kung magpo-post sila sa audience na Followers o Public.
profile.sectionCrashedBody: May nangyaring mali sa section na ito.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: I-forward ang incoming calls at texts sa verified phone o email mo. Maaaring ipakita ng outgoing calls/texts ang Chatforia number mo.
profile.errE164: Maglagay ng valid na E.164 phone number (hal., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Pumili ng kahit isang destination (phone o email).
profile.errQuietHours: Ang quiet hours ay dapat nasa pagitan ng 0 at 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Age range lang ini-store namin, hindi eksaktong petsa ng kapanganakan. Ginagamit ito para panatilihing reasonable ang Random Chat pairings.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Gumamit ng age-based matching sa Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Kapag naka-on, susubukan ka naming i-pair sa mga taong nasa compatible age ranges.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ang teens ay palaging ima-match lang sa ibang teens. Hindi maaaring ma-match ang adults sa teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Para sa kaligtasan, ang accounts na nasa 13–17 age range ay maaari lang ma-match sa ibang 13–17 accounts sa Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Payagan si Ria na tandaan ang mga sinasabi mo
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Kapag naka-on ito, magagamit ang ni Ria ang nakaraang Random Chat conversations mo (sa iyo lang) para mas maging tuloy-tuloy ang usapan. Maaari mo itong i-off anumang oras.
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Email para ipadala voicemail notifications sa
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Ginagamit kapag hindi available ang audio greeting mo.
profile.voicemailNote: Ang voicemails mula sa iyong Chatforia numbers ay mase-save sa Voicemail inbox mo. Maaari mong i-enable ang transcription at forwarding sa supported plans.
profile.portHint: Gusto mong panatilihin ang kasalukuyan mong numero? Maaari mo itong i-port sa Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Profile ng User
esim.desc: Kumuha ng mobile data para sa Chatforia kapag malayo ka sa Wi‑Fi.
esim.cta: Kumuha ng eSIM / Ipakita ang QR

sounds.freeNoticeStart: Nasa Free ka — ipinapakita ang Premium tones pero naka-lock.

sounds.freeNotice: You’re on Free — premium tones are shown but locked. Upgrade to unlock all.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Kontrolin ang translation, smart replies, at ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Ipadala sa AI ang huling ilang natanggap na mensahe (sanitized) para magmungkahi ng quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Kapag naka-on, ima-mask ang flagged words sa suggestions na ibabalik ng AI.
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: I-enable ang auto-reply kapag I’m busy

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Mga option para gawing mas madaling gamitin ang Chatforia nang hindi umaasa tunog.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase kung ikaw prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Visual alerts para sa mga mensahe & mga tawag
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Ipakita banners at title blink so ikaw huwag miss aktibidad.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate sa bago mga mensahe (kapag supported)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Trigger device vibration kasama ang notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash kapag isang tawag rings.
accessibilitySettings.enableLiveCaptions: I-enable ang live captions during mga tawag (Premium)
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Ipakita real-time captions mula sa ibang participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach isang transcript sa audio mga mensahe ikaw tumanggap.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Ciphertext lang i-store sa server. Idi-disable nito ang AI/Translate at moderation previews.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE naka-enable. AI/Isalin will be naka-disable.

wireless.description: Pamahalaan ang Chatforia mobile plan, numbers, forwarding, at number porting mo.

options.heading: Piliin kung paano mo gustong gamitin ang Chatforia

options.portNumber: I-port ang kasalukuyan mong numero sa Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: I-port ang kasalukuyan mong numero
port.subheading: Ilipat ang kasalukuyan mong phone number mula sa kasalukuyan mong carrier papunta sa Chatforia. Siguraduhing eksaktong tugma ang details sa carrier account mo para maiwasan ang delays.
port.success: Naisumite ang port request! Pananatilihin ka naming updated.

status.heading: Status ng porting
status.subheading: I-track ang status ng number port requests mo.

wireless.exhausted: Naubos na ang data mo. Bumili ng bagong pack para magpatuloy sa paggamit ng mobile data.

data.caption: Track your current data usage and remaining balance.

plan.noneBodyReady: Set up your eSIM first, then choose a data pack when you’re ready.

instructions.step2: Choose Add eSIM or Scan QR Code.

premium.heading: Mag-Premium
premium.description: I-unlock ang power features at alisin ang ads.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: This feature requires a Premium plan.

upgrade.title: Mag-upgrade
upgrade.h1: Mga Presyo at Plano ng Chatforia
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Magsimula sa aming libre at ad-supported na plan. Mag-Plus para walang ads, o i-unlock ang buong power features gamit ang Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Choose an app plan, add data packs for yourself, or share data with your family — all from one place.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Magsimula kasama ang aming libre, ad-supported plano. Go walang ads kasama ang Plus, o i-unlock buong power features kasama ang Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Magdagdag global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even kapag ikaw ay away mula sa Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Gumawa ng shared data pool para sa iyong pamilya at pamahalaan everyone’s usage mula sa one place.
upgrade.benefitsLine: I-unlock ang power features at alisin ang ads.

auth.signInOrCreateAnAccount: Sign in or create an account
auth.logInToYourChatforiaAccount: Log in to your Chatforia account

public.premiumAnnual: Save 30% with annual – continue to login

section.mobile: Magdagdag global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even kapag ikaw ay away mula sa Wi-Fi.

free.title: Libre
free.desc: Magsimulang mag-message nang libre. Ideal kung sinusubukan mo pa lang Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 at group chat, pati voice at video calls
features.media: Magbahagi ng photos, voice messages, at short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies at instant translation (fair use)
features.disappearing: Disappearing messages at basic privacy controls
features.ads: Libre magpakailanman na may ads sa app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Lahat ng essentials, walang ads. Maganda para sa araw-araw na messaging at calling.

features.allFree: Lahat ng nasa Free, walang ads
features.forwarding: I-forward ang calls at texts sa totoong phone number mo
features.history: Mas mahabang message history (hanggang 6 na buwan)
features.support: Mas mabilis na support kapag may problema

plus.ctaPublic: Kunin ang Plus – magpatuloy sa login

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Buwanang)
premiumMonthly.desc: Ang buong Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, at priority support.

features.themes: I-unlock ang lahat ng premium color themes at app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools para sa rewrites, smart replies, at summaries
features.support: Priority support kapag pinakakailangan mo ng tulong
features.number: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: I-unlock ang Premium – magpatuloy sa login

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Taunan)
premiumAnnual.desc: Mas makatipid kapag yearly ang billing — kasama ang extra color themes, AI tools, at priority support.

features.allPremium: Lahat ng nasa Premium Monthly — kasama ang extra color themes
features.annualBilling: Sisingilin nang isang beses bawat taon
features.save25: Makatipid ng humigit-kumulang 30% kumpara sa monthly payment
features.bestFor: Pinakamainam para sa power users, remote workers, at heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Sinisingil agad. Kanselahin anumang oras. Walang nakatagong bayarin.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Buong features, ringtones, at AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Sinisingil agad. Kanselahin anumang oras. Walang nakatagong bayarin.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick isang one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working kapag ikaw ay traveling o away mula sa Wi-Fi.
mobile.cta: Kunin ang data pack na ito
mobile.ctaPublic: Kunin ang data pack na ito

features.heavyUse: high-speed data para sa heavy gamit
features.throttle: Bilis maaaring slow after mataas usage

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: Kailangan ng eSIM-compatible at unlocked device para sa eSIM data packs. Nag-iiba ang availability ayon sa phone model, carrier, at bansa. Nag-iiba rin ang coverage at speeds ayon sa region.
disclaimer.fairUse: Subject sa fair-use patakaran at local limits

compare.title: Ihambing mga eSIM data pack
compare.disclaimer: Aktuwal data usage depende sa paawalang ikaw gamit ang Chatforia (voice, video, media, at ibang apps sa iyong telepono).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Starter pack
small.bestFor: Maikli biyahe, light pagmemensahe, at paminsan-minsan mga tawag

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.bestFor: Weekend biyahe, regular VoIP mga tawag, at maps

large.title: Power pack
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, mga tawag, video, at hotspot gamit

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Chatforia Pamilya (shared data)
family.subtitle: Mag-share ng iisang data pool sa pamilya mo. Isang bill, maraming Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB ng shared high-speed data — maganda para sa 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB ng shared high-speed data — ideal para sa 3–5 active mga miyembro.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB ng shared high-speed data — para sa power families iyon are always online.

feature.shared: shared data pool para sa iyong pamilya
feature.membersMore: Maganda para sa 3–5 active mga miyembro
feature.manage: Pamahalaan limits para sa bawat miyembro
feature.fairUse: Subject sa fair-use patakaran at local limits

family.disclaimer: Gumagawa o nagto-top up ng shared data pool ang Family packs. Maaari kang mag-imbita at mag-alis ng members anumang oras.
family.footnote: Pinaghahatian ng linked Chatforia accounts ang iisang data pool sa Family packs. Nakadepende ang availability at limits sa bansa mo at local regulations.

why.title: Bakit lumilipat ang mga tao sa Chatforia
why.subtitle: Binibigyan ka ng Chatforia ng totoong phone number, smart translation, at malinaw na paraan para maging ad-free kapag handa ka na.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Mas magaan ang ads sa Free, may simpleng Plus upgrade kapag handa ka na, at may Premium tools na wala sa TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, at built-in translation sa halip na lumang call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Mag-text sa totoong phone numbers — hindi lang sa ibang app users — gamit ang AI at built-in status. Maganda kung galing ka sa apps tulad ng TextFree o TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Paghahambing batay sa publicly available impormasyon at maaaring magpalit sa paglipas ng panahon. Ibang free-texting apps tulad ng TextFree o TextMe are generally similar sa TextNow.

faq.title: FAQ sa presyo at mga plano

free.q: Talaga bang libre ang Free plan?
free.a: Oo. Kasama sa Free plan ang Chatforia number, pagtawag, at messaging na may ads. Maaari kang manatili sa Free hangga’t gusto mo, o mag-upgrade para alisin ang ads at i-unlock ang mas maraming feature.

plusPremium.q: Ano ang pagkakaiba ng Plus at Premium?
plusPremium.a: Tinatanggal ng Plus ang ads at pinapahaba ang message history mo — perpekto para sa araw-araw na paggamit. Nagdaragdag ang Premium ng extra customization, AI tools para sa rewrites at replies, at priority support para sa heavy users.

esim.q: Saan gumagana ang eSIM data packs?
esim.a: Gumagamit ang Chatforia Mobile ng global eSIM coverage. Nakadepende ang availability sa iyong bansa at device. Makikita mo ang supported options habang nag-a-activate sa app.

cancel.q: Maaari ba akong magkansela o magpalit ng plano anumang oras?
cancel.a: Oo. Maaari mong pamahalaan o kanselahin ang subscription mo mula sa billing page sa app. Magkakabisa mga pagbabago sa dulo ng kasalukuyan mong billing period.

family.a: Gumagawa ang Family packs ng shared data pool sa maraming Chatforia accounts. Isang tao ang nagbabayad ng bill, at maaari kang mag-imbita o mag-alis ng members at mag-set ng limits kada tao.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet isang tao bago kaagad, o pumili sa chat kasama ang Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Magdagdag Kaibigan later kung itong feels right.
randomChat.setAge: I-set ang age range mo sa Profile → Age & Random Chat para ma-match sa ibang tao.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: Waiting para sa kanila sa accept Magdagdag Kaibigan…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Nakatago ang usernames hanggang parehong piliin ng dalawang tao ang Add Friend.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Chat kasama ang Ria anytime — separate mula sa random human matching.
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

support.heading: Paawalang can kami tulong?
support.contactIntro: Kami ay subukan sa resolve itong kaagad. Kung hindi, aming team will i-follow up.
support.sent: Mensahe sent. Kami ay reply sa email.
support.sendError: Hindi magawang ipadala. Email support@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Hindi magawang complete iyon action. Pakisuyo subukan muli.
support.ticketCreated: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.escalationMessage: Kami couldn’t resolve itong automatically. Aming team will i-follow up.
support.genericError: Something went wrong. Pakisuyo subukan muli.
support.resolvedInstantly: Issue resolved kaagad — walang ticket needed.

account.q: Paawalang ako gagawa o magre-recover ng account?
account.a: I-download ang app o gamitin angin ang web, i-tap ang “Gumawa ng account”, at i-verify ang iyong email/phone. Para mag-recover, gamitin ang “Nakalimutan ang password”.

privacy.q: End-to-end encrypted ba ang mga mensahe?
privacy.a: Oo. End-to-end encrypted bilang default ang messages at calls. Ikaw lang at ang recipient ang makakabasa nito.

translate.a: I-enable ang “Auto-translate” sa Settings → Appearance & Language. Isinasalin namin on-device kung supported; kung hindi, sa secure APIs na may minimal metadata.

contact.a: Makipag-ugnayan sa amin sa support@chatforia.com. Isama ang screenshots at app version mo.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes.

alert.text: This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section1.title: 1) Create your account
section1.prefsStart: In the app, open Settings to set your preferences

section2.title: 2) Start messaging
section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Go further
section3.item1: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app.
section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
section3.item2Part1: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.

howItWorks.title: Paano Gumagana ang Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: Dinisenyo ang Chatforia para gawing simple, mabilis, at accessible ang komunikasyon. Ilang hakbang lang para makapagsimula.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Mag-sign up gamit ang email o username mo para gumawa ng Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Kumonekta sa iba sa pamamagitan ng pagpili ng contacts o pagsisimula ng bagong chat.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Mabilis na naihahatid ang mga mensahe para sa smooth na communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Tumutulong built-in translation para makapag-usap ang users sa iba’t ibang wika.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Pamahalaan ang preferences, contacts, at communication settings mo.

safety.title: Kaligtasan & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Nakatuon ang Chatforia sa pagpapanatili ng ligtas at magalang na kapaligiran para sa lahat ng user. Ang mga alituntuning itong ay tumutulong upang maging positibo ang karanasan ng lahat.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected sa makipag-ugnayan respectfully. Harassment, abuso, o harmful behavior is hindi permitted.

tools.block: I-block users para maiwasan further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: Maaari kaming take action against accounts iyon violate ang mga itong guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, o permanent removal mula sa platform.

whyMessaging.title: Bakit mas mahalaga ang messaging platforms kaysa dati
whyMessaging.intro: Ang mga messaging platform ay naging isa pinakamahalagang paraan ng komunikasyon ngayon. Mula sa personal na usapan hanggang sa business interactions, tinutulungan ng messaging apps ang mga tao na manatiling konektado nang mabilis at madali.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Umaasa mga tao sa messaging apps para sa araw-araw na komunikasyon sa mga kaibigan, pamilya, at katrabaho. Mabilis man itong update o mahabang usapan, nagbibigay ang messaging maginhawa at flexible na paraan para manatiling konektado.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Isa pangunahing bentahe ng messaging platforms ay bilis. Naihahatid agad ang mga mensahe, kaya nakakapag-usap ang mga user nang real time. Dahil dito, messaging mas pinipiling paraan ng komunikasyon ng maraming tao.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Pagmemensahe platforms kumonekta mga tao across ang globe. Kasama ang internet access, users can makipag-ugnayan regardless ng location, making itong easier para bumuo ng relationships at collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Nakatuon ang modern messaging platforms sa pagbibigay sa mga user ng kontrol sa kanilang data at mga usapan. Ang features tulad ng encryption, privacy settings, at message controls ay tumutulong sa users na makipag-usap nang may kumpiyansa.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Patuloy na umuunlad ang messaging kasama ang bagong features gaya ng AI-powered responses, translation, at multimedia sharing. Habang umuunlad ang technology, magiging mas powerful at versatile ang messaging platforms.
whyMessaging.outro: Binuo ang Chatforia batay sa mga prinsipyong ito, na nagbibigay ng mabilis, secure, at user-friendly na messaging experience para sa isang konektadong mundo.

global.title: Ang hinaharap ng global na komunikasyon
global.intro: Mabilis na nagbago ang komunikasyon sa nakalipas na mga dekada. Ang dating kailangan ng phone calls o personal na meeting ay nagagawa na ngayon nang mabilis sa messaging platforms. Habang umuunlad ang teknolohiya, nagiging mas mabilis, mas accessible, at mas inclusive ang global na komunikasyon.
global.barriersDesc: Isa pinakamalaking pagbabago sa komunikasyon ay ang pagbawas ng geographic barriers. Maaari nang kumonekta ang mga tao sa iba sa buong mundo nang halos tunay na time. Para man sa personal na usapan, business, o collaboration, ginawang mas maliit na hadlang messaging platforms ang distansya.
global.translationDesc: Matagal nang isa pinakamalaking hadlang sa global communication ang wika. Ngayon, tumutulong built-in translation tools na tulayin ang gap na iyon. Pinapadali ng platforms tulad ng Chatforia ang pakikipag-usap kahit magkaiba ang wika ng users, na lumilikha ng bagong opportunities para sa connection at understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Mahalagang salik ang bilis sa modernong komunikasyon. Inaasahan ng users na mabilis ma-deliver ang mga mensahe, at sinusuportahan ito ng modernong infrastructure. Ginagawang mas natural at tuloy-tuloy ng real-time messaging mga usapan.
global.privacyDesc: Habang nagiging mas digital ang komunikasyon, mas nagiging mahalaga ang privacy at seguridad. Gusto ng mga user na makasiguro na protektado ang kanilang mga usapan. Tinutulungan ng encryption at user-controlled settings na gawing mas secure ang komunikasyon.
global.futureDesc: Malamang na kasama sa hinaharap ng global communication ang mas advanced na tools, gaya ng AI-assisted messaging, mas mahusay na translation, at mas pinahusay na user experiences. Habang umuunlad ang technology, patuloy na magiging mas intuitive at accessible ang komunikasyon.
global.outro: Platforms tulad ng Chatforia are part ng itong shift, helping mga tao kumonekta more easily across mga wika at borders.

index.title: Chatforia Blog
index.intro: Tuklasin ang mga insight tungkol sa komunikasyon, online safety, at kung paano pinagkokonekta ng messaging technology ang mga tao sa buong mundo.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Ang Chatforia ay isang secure at multilingual messenger na may end-to-end encryption, instant translation, at voice/video calling.

values.access: Access para sa lahat: Auto-translate 100+ mga wika.
values.control: Control: disappearing messages & read receipts are opsyonal.
values.access_aria: Access para sa lahat: Auto-translate 100+ mga wika.
values.control_aria: Control: disappearing messages at read receipts are opsyonal.

about.howDescription: Ang mga mensahe ay naka-encrypt sa iyong device bago umalis dito. Ang translation, backups, at device sync ay dinisenyo upang mabawasan ang nakikita ng aming servers.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Para sa media inquiries, reach amin at
press.boilerplateBody: Ang Chatforia ay isang privacy-first messaging app na nagpapadali ng cross-language chat. Ang mga mensahe ay end-to-end encrypted bilang default, at sinusuportahan ng built-in translation ang 100+ wika sa tunay na time. Maaaring i-enable ang mga user ang disappearing messages, panatilihing opsyonal ang read receipts, at i-sync ang account sa iba’t ibang device.
press.scanTip: Sa desktop? Scan gamit ang iyong telepowalang sa kunin ang app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re isang small founding team building Chatforia — isang pribado, global messenger launching sa web, iOS, at Android. Kung ikaw care about privacy, encryption, at delightful user experiences, we’d love sa hear mula sa ikaw.
careers.openRoles: Buksan founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Seguridad & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Paawalang sa apply: Gamitin ang button below sa email iyong resume at links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Tulong build ang foundation ng isang bago global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, at Android.
• Work direkta kasama ang founder sa architecture at product direction.
• Own high-impact areas ng stack: pagmemensahe, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at ang beginning — before ang user base scales.

advertise.title: Advertise kasama ang Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged pagmemensahe users kasama ang tasteful, brand-safe placements. Kami offer banner inventory sa high-visibility spots, sponsorships, at house promos. Premium subscribers do hindi see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Kami also serve inventory via Google AdSense. Maaari kang target Chatforia kasama ang publisher ID {{pubId}}, o gamitin ang form below para sa direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Kami also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—gamit ang form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing aming ad inventory. Tell amin about iyong campaign at kami ay recommend placements.

why.highSession: Mataas session frequency at dwell panahon sa chat UI
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Magsimula ng Chat” modal) available
why.deals: Direct deals o programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Thanks! Iyong inquiry is sa nitong way. Kami ay i-follow up shortly.
form.missingRequired: Pakisuyo fill sa pangalan, email, at mensahe.
form.successToast: Thanks! Kami ay be sa touch soon.
form.mailtoInfo: Opening iyong email client para ipadala ang inquiry…

legal.disclaimerStart: Sa pamamagitan ng submitting, ikaw agree sa aming

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Patakaran sa Refund
refund.intro: Sa Chatforia, nagsusumikap kaming magbigay ng de-kalidad na serbisyo sa lahat ng user. Ipinapaliwanag ng Refund Policy na itong kung kailan maaaring magbigay ng refund.

subscriptions.title: Mga Subscription
subscriptions.body: Ang subscriptions ay sinisingil nang advance at recurring. Maaari kang magkansela anumang oras sa account settings o sa platform na ginamit sa pagbili.

eligibility.title: Pagiging Karapat-dapat sa Refund
eligibility.body: Maaaring magbigay ng refund para sa duplicate charges, billing errors, o technical issues na pumipigil sa access sa paid features. Lahat ng request ay nire-review case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Hindi Mare-refund
nonRefundable.body: Kami generally do hindi provide refunds para sa unused panahon, partial subscription periods, o failure para kanselahin before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Mga Pagbili sa Third Party
thirdParty.body: Kung purchased through third-party platforms such bilang Apple App Store, refunds must be requested direkta through ang mga iyon platforms.

contact.title: Makipag-ugnayan
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email

privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
privacyTerms.bodyStart: By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our
